title: Garlicky Crumbly Potato Crumble
description: A crowd-pleasing Irish dish featuring dried mint and diabetic-friendly spices that combines crispy topping with tender potatoes.

ingredients.name: Potatoes
ingredients.notes: Waxy potatoes like Russet or Yukon Gold are recommended

ingredients.name: Bhuna Masala
ingredients.notes: A blend of spices including turmeric, cumin, and coriander

ingredients.name: Dried Mint
ingredients.notes: Adds a refreshing touch to the dish

instructions: Slice potatoes into rounds about 1/4 inch thick.
Boil sliced potatoes until tender, about 20 minutes.
Drain and set aside for cooling.
In a mixing bowl, combine garlic powder, flour, bhuna masala, dried mint, salt, and extra virgin olive oil. Mix well.
Layer the cooled potato slices in a greased dish or baking pan.
Sprinkle the crumb mixture evenly over the potatoes.
Bake for 25-30 minutes until golden brown and crispy on top.
Allow to cool slightly before serving.
